_comment: Seedance 2.0 (fal.ai) shot list. Replace PLACEHOLDER prompts + REPLACE_* image URLs with the strategist's video plan. aspect_ratio 9:16 = phone slots, 16:9 = hero/deck/sizzle. image_url/end_image_url/image_urls must be PUBLIC URLs (host stills on Firebase first). Dry-run: `node scripts/gen_seedance_videos.mjs`.

shots.prompt: PLACEHOLDER - ambient hero: a dark city map at night seen from above, a sonar ping ripples outward, glowing dots awaken across the street grid, subtle cinematic motion, teal/orange/magenta accents, no text.
PLACEHOLDER - person on a busy expo floor glances at their phone, a live map glows on screen, they smile and walk toward a booth. Natural handheld motion.
PLACEHOLDER - bright coffee shop, phone shows a nearby-person card, a tap reveals a profile, warm natural light, relaxed pacing.
PLACEHOLDER - night bar, a Swag Bag perk card pops up on the phone (line-skip, LB$), neon magenta glow, energetic motion.

PLACEHOLDER multi-shot - At 0s: sunrise over Long Beach, an expo floor wakes up. Cut scene to: people connecting on the floor, a digital handshake. Cut scene to: afternoon coffee networking, a tap-to-connect. Cut scene to: night, neon bars, a perk drops to a phone. End on a glowing sonar radar logo. Upbeat cinematic music, ambient crowd.
